# Cost Model — 0000003-hook-based-enforcement

*Generated by spec-agent.*

---

## Overview

This feature delivers local-execution scripts and documentation files. There is no cloud infrastructure, no managed service, and no recurring cost associated with the deliverables themselves.

---

## Cost Breakdown

| Category | Component | Estimate | Notes |
|----------|-----------|----------|-------|
| Compute | Hook script execution (Node.js) | Negligible | Scripts run for ≤ 3 seconds on the developer's local machine. CPU cost is immeasurable in practice. |
| Storage | Hook scripts + adapter scripts + setup scripts | < 100 KB total | All framework files. One-time addition to the repo. |
| Storage | Flag files in `{tmpdir}/planifest-telemetry/` | < 1 KB per session | OS-managed; cleaned up on reboot or OS temp cleanup policy. |
| Storage | `plan/current/.skips` | < 1 KB per feature | Plain text; deleted at Ship time. |
| Egress | Telemetry HTTP POST per hook fire | ~1 KB per event | Payload is a small JSON envelope. Typically localhost or LAN. No cloud egress cost. |
| Third-party | structured-telemetry-mcp server | Cost of the server's hosting (not this feature) | This feature adds ~2 events per phase per session to the existing telemetry volume. |
| Third-party | Bun runtime (opencode Tier 2) | $0 — bundled with opencode | No separate license or install cost. |
| npm package hosting | `@planifest/opencode-hooks` | $0 (public npm, or private if preferred) | Package size < 50 KB. |

---

## Summary

**Total incremental cost of this feature: effectively $0.**

All execution is local. The only ongoing cost vector is telemetry HTTP requests, which are typically to a local or LAN server and have negligible network cost. If the structured-telemetry-mcp server is hosted in the cloud, per-event egress costs are covered under that service's cost model, not this feature's.
